---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability for SPARTAN
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What security research problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the implementation you have in mind. If you have a code sketch, include it.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you explored any existing workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Ethical Considerations

Confirm this feature is intended for **authorized security research only** and
does not introduce capabilities that could facilitate unauthorized system access
in ways not already present in the tool.

- [ ] Yes, this feature is for authorized use only.

## Additional Context

Anything else — links to research, CVEs, bug bounty program references, etc.
